requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — NTE INEN / RTE INEN (IEC 62368-1 aligned, 120 V / 60 Hz, Type A/B plug)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——NTE INEN / RTE INEN（IEC 62368-1对标，120V/60Hz，A/B型插头）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——NTE INEN / RTE INEN（IEC 62368-1對標，120V/60Hz，A/B型插頭）

summary.en: Electrical safety for audio/video, information technology, and telecom equipment in Ecuador follows NTE INEN standards and mandatory RTE INEN (Reglamentos Técnicos Ecuatorianos) aligned with IEC 62368-1 (the consolidated audio/video, IT, and communications equipment safety standard superseding IEC 60950-1 and IEC 60065). Ecuador operates at 120 V / 60 Hz with Type A/B plugs (same electrical infrastructure as the United States). Chinese exporters whose products are already compliant with US-market requirements (e.g., UL 62368-1 NRTL listed) benefit from hardware that is electrically compatible with Ecuador's mains supply, but NTE INEN and RTE INEN safety compliance evidence must still be submitted within the ARCOTEL homologación technical dossier. INEN does not directly recognise CCC (GB 4943.1) or UL NRTL listing as substitutes for NTE INEN compliance, but IEC 62368-1 CB Scheme certificates from IECEE-recognised National Certification Bodies may be accepted as supporting evidence — confirm with INEN/ARCOTEL.
summary.zh: 厄瓜多尔音视频、信息技术及电信设备的电气安全遵循与IEC 62368-1（取代IEC 60950-1和IEC 60065的整合型音视频、IT及通信设备安全标准）接轨的NTE INEN标准和强制性RTE INEN（厄瓜多尔技术法规）。厄瓜多尔采用120V/60Hz、A/B型插头（与美国电力基础设施相同）。面向美国市场已合规（如通过UL 62368-1 NRTL认证）的中国出口商产品的硬件与厄瓜多尔市电兼容，但NTE INEN和RTE INEN安全合规证明仍须在ARCOTEL型式认可技术档案中提交。INEN不直接认可CCC（GB 4943.1）或UL NRTL认证作为NTE INEN合规的替代，但IECEE认可的国家认证机构颁发的IEC 62368-1 CB体系证书可作为支持性证明——须向INEN/ARCOTEL确认。
summary.zht: 厄瓜多音視頻、資訊技術及電信設備的電氣安全遵循與IEC 62368-1（取代IEC 60950-1和IEC 60065的整合型音視頻、IT及通信設備安全標準）接軌的NTE INEN標準和強制性RTE INEN（厄瓜多技術法規）。厄瓜多採用120V/60Hz、A/B型插頭（與美國電力基礎設施相同）。面向美國市場已合規（如通過UL 62368-1 NRTL認證）的中國出口商產品的硬件與厄瓜多市電相容，但NTE INEN和RTE INEN安全合規證明仍須在ARCOTEL型式認可技術檔案中提交。INEN不直接認可CCC（GB 4943.1）或UL NRTL認證作為NTE INEN合規的替代，但IECEE認可的國家認證機構頒發的IEC 62368-1 CB體系證書可作為支持性證明——須向INEN/ARCOTEL確認。

standards_or_laws: NTE INEN (IEC 62368-1 equivalent) — audio/video, IT and communications technology equipment safety standard
RTE INEN applicable to product category — mandatory Ecuadorian technical regulation for electrical safety where a specific RTE INEN exists for the product type
Ecuador electrical supply: 120 V / 60 Hz / Type A/B plug (NEMA 1-15 / NEMA 5-15)
IEC 62368-1 (CB Scheme) — internationally harmonised safety standard; CB certificates from IECEE-recognised NCBs may be accepted as supporting evidence
ARCOTEL homologación technical dossier requirements — electrical safety test reports required

summary.en: CCC (3C) certification to GB 4943.1 (transitioning to IEC 62368-1 alignment under GB 4943.1-2022) is the mandatory Chinese electrical safety requirement for IT and telecom equipment. Chinese products are designed for 220 V / 50 Hz domestic mains. Products with universal 100–240 V / 50–60 Hz switched-mode power supplies are electrically compatible with Ecuador's 120 V / 60 Hz supply. However, CCC and GB 4943.1 are not recognised by INEN or ARCOTEL as substitutes for NTE INEN compliance. Exporters with IEC 62368-1 CB Scheme test reports (obtained through CBTL / IECEE route) may leverage these as supporting evidence.
summary.zh: CCC（3C）认证（依据GB 4943.1，正向GB 4943.1-2022过渡以与IEC 62368-1接轨）是中国IT及电信设备的强制电气安全要求。中国产品按220V/50Hz市电设计。配备通用100–240V/50–60Hz开关电源的产品与厄瓜多尔120V/60Hz供电兼容。但CCC和GB 4943.1不被INEN或ARCOTEL认可为NTE INEN合规的替代。持有IEC 62368-1 CB体系检测报告（通过CBTL / IECEE路径取得）的出口商可将其作为支持性证明。
summary.zht: CCC（3C）認證（依據GB 4943.1，正向GB 4943.1-2022過渡以與IEC 62368-1接軌）是中國IT及電信設備的強制電氣安全要求。中國產品按220V/50Hz市電設計。配備通用100–240V/50–60Hz開關電源的產品與厄瓜多120V/60Hz供電相容。但CCC和GB 4943.1不被INEN或ARCOTEL認可為NTE INEN合規的替代。持有IEC 62368-1 CB體系檢測報告（通過CBTL / IECEE路徑取得）的出口商可將其作為支持性證明。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 / GB 4943.1-2022 (IEC 60950-1 / IEC 62368-1 transitioning) — mandatory Chinese IT and telecom equipment electrical safety standard
CCC (3C) Certification — mandatory for applicable product categories in China under CNCA
IEC 62368-1 CB Scheme — internationally recognised safety testing route; CB certificates may support NTE INEN compliance evidence

gap.en: Partial gap: Ecuador's 120 V / 60 Hz / Type A/B environment is advantageous for Chinese exporters with US-spec or universal-input (100–240 V) hardware. IEC 62368-1 alignment is the technical bridge between Chinese GB 4943.1-2022 and NTE INEN. However, NTE INEN and applicable RTE INEN compliance evidence must be presented in the ARCOTEL dossier; CCC (GB 4943.1) is not a recognised equivalent. Exporters with existing IEC 62368-1 CB Scheme certificates (from IECEE-recognised NCBs) may be able to leverage them as supporting evidence — but INEN and ARCOTEL acceptance must be confirmed before relying on this route.
gap.zh: 部分差距：厄瓜多尔120V/60Hz/A/B型环境对持有美规或通用输入（100–240V）硬件的中国出口商具有优势。IEC 62368-1接轨是中国GB 4943.1-2022与NTE INEN之间的技术桥梁。但NTE INEN和适用RTE INEN符合性证明须在ARCOTEL档案中提供；CCC（GB 4943.1）不被认可为等同文件。持有IEC 62368-1 CB体系证书（来自IECEE认可NCB）的出口商可将其作为支持性证明——但在采用此路径前，须确认INEN和ARCOTEL的受理情况。
gap.zht: 部分差距：厄瓜多120V/60Hz/A/B型環境對持有美規或通用輸入（100–240V）硬件的中國出口商具有優勢。IEC 62368-1接軌是中國GB 4943.1-2022與NTE INEN之間的技術橋梁。但NTE INEN和適用RTE INEN符合性證明須在ARCOTEL檔案中提供；CCC（GB 4943.1）不被認可為等同文件。持有IEC 62368-1 CB體系證書（來自IECEE認可NCB）的出口商可將其作為支持性證明——但在採用此路徑前，須確認INEN和ARCOTEL的受理情況。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — NTE INEN electrical safety compliance (IEC 62368-1 aligned) required as part of ARCOTEL homologación dossier; mandatory RTE INEN applies where a specific regulation exists for the product category
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification to GB 4943.1 / GB 4943.1-2022 required for IT and telecom equipment sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] NTE INEN electrical safety standards (IEC 62368-1 aligned) and applicable RTE INEN apply to IT, telecom, and IoT equipment in Ecuador. Ecuador's 120 V / 60 Hz / Type A/B supply is advantageous for US-spec or universal-input Chinese products. CCC is not a recognised substitute for NTE INEN compliance; IEC 62368-1 CB Scheme certificates from IECEE-recognised bodies may be accepted as supporting evidence — confirm with INEN and ARCOTEL. Verify applicable RTE INEN for your product category and accepted test report formats before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] NTE INEN电气安全标准（IEC 62368-1对标）和适用RTE INEN适用于厄瓜多尔的IT、电信及物联网设备。厄瓜多尔120V/60Hz/A/B型供电对美规或通用输入的中国产品具有优势。CCC不被认可为NTE INEN合规的替代；IECEE认可机构颁发的IEC 62368-1 CB体系证书可作为支持性证明——请向INEN和ARCOTEL确认。发货前请核验您产品类别适用的RTE INEN及受理的测试报告格式。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] NTE INEN電氣安全標準（IEC 62368-1對標）和適用RTE INEN適用於厄瓜多的IT、電信及物聯網設備。厄瓜多120V/60Hz/A/B型供電對美規或通用輸入的中國產品具有優勢。CCC不被認可為NTE INEN合規的替代；IECEE認可機構頒發的IEC 62368-1 CB體系證書可作為支持性證明——請向INEN和ARCOTEL確認。發貨前請核驗您產品類別適用的RTE INEN及受理的測試報告格式。
